PLK.description:
Plugin License Key - Issued license for plugin access
Uses ECIES: both parties derive symmetric key via X25519 ECDH
Key derivation: X25519(private, peer_public) → HKDF-SHA256 → AES-256-GCM

PLUGIN_ID.description: Plugin ID this license is for

ISSUER_PUBKEY.description:
Issuer's X25519 public key (32 bytes)
Used with licensee's private key to derive shared secret via ECDH

ISSUED_AT.description: Unix timestamp when license was issued

VALID_FROM.description: Unix timestamp when license becomes valid

EXPIRES_AT.description: Unix timestamp when license expires (0 = never expires)

ISSUER_PEER_ID.description: Peer ID of the license issuer (OrbPro)

SIGNATURE.description: Ed25519 signature from issuer over all fields (except SIGNATURE)

KP1.description: Planetary 3-hour Range Index (Kp) for 0000-0300 UT, multiplied by 10

KP2.description: Planetary 3-hour Range Index (Kp) for 0300-0600 UT, multiplied by 10

KP3.description: Planetary 3-hour Range Index (Kp) for 0600-0900 UT, multiplied by 10

KP4.description: Planetary 3-hour Range Index (Kp) for 0900-1200 UT, multiplied by 10

KP5.description: Planetary 3-hour Range Index (Kp) for 1200-1500 UT, multiplied by 10

KP6.description: Planetary 3-hour Range Index (Kp) for 1500-1800 UT, multiplied by 10

KP7.description: Planetary 3-hour Range Index (Kp) for 1800-2100 UT, multiplied by 10

KP8.description: Planetary 3-hour Range Index (Kp) for 2100-0000 UT, multiplied by 10

KP_SUM.description: Sum of the 8 Kp indices for the day

AP_AVG.description: Arithmetic average of the 8 Ap indices for the day

EXPIRES_AT.description: Envelope expiration time in milliseconds since epoch

FrequencyRange.description: Frequency range with lower and upper limits

StokesParameters.description: Stokes parameters, representing different aspects of polarization

U.description: Another linear polarization, orthogonal to Q

Band.description: Table representing a frequency band with a name and frequency range

DATA_MODE.description: Mode of the data (real, simulated, synthetic)

POWER_TYPE.description: Type of power (eg. AC or DC)

TRANSMIT.description: Indicates if the EMT can transmit

RECEIVE.description: Indicates if the EMT can receive

TASKABLE.description: Indicates if the site is taskable

FrequencyRange.description: Frequency range with lower and upper limits

StokesParameters.description: Stokes parameters, representing different aspects of polarization

U.description: Another linear polarization, orthogonal to Q

Band.description: Table representing a frequency band with a name and frequency range

DATA_MODE.description: Mode of the data (real, simulated, synthetic)

POWER_TYPE.description: Type of power (eg. AC or DC)

TRANSMIT.description: Indicates if the EMT can transmit

RECEIVE.description: Indicates if the EMT can receive

TASKABLE.description: Indicates if the site is taskable

odSensorContribution.description: Sensor contribution to an orbit determination solution

NUM_ACCEPTED.description: Number of accepted observations from this sensor

NUM_REJECTED.description: Number of rejected observations from this sensor

WRMS.description: Weighted RMS for this sensor's observations

INITIAL_OD.description: True if this is an initial orbit determination

APRIORI_ELSET.description: A priori element set data reference

APRIORI_STATE_VECTOR.description: A priori state vector data reference

BALLISTIC_COEFF_EST.description: True if ballistic coefficient was estimated

AGOM_EST.description: True if area-to-mass ratio was estimated

SOURCE_ID.description: Reference to source imagery (e.g., SKI, GDI, EOO)

KEY_ID.description: Logical key identifier used across publication and grant records.

ROLE.description: Role the key bytes fulfill for the module flow.

ALGORITHM.description: Algorithm or key family for the key bytes.

KEY_BYTES.description:
Explicit key bytes when a module must receive them on a port.
This may be field-encrypted using the SDS/da-flatbuffers header-first
encryption flow when transported to a specific recipient.

VERSION.description: Logical version of the key material.

EXPIRES_AT.description: Expiration time in unix milliseconds, or 0 if unbounded.

BOOSTING.description: True if object is in boost phase

DROP_PT_IND.description: True if drop point indicator set

VECTOR_COMPONENTS.description: Number of components per vector (default 6: X, Y, Z, VX, VY, VZ)

VECTORS.description: Vector data as flat array [X0, Y0, Z0, VX0, VY0, VZ0, X1, ...]

AOU_RPT.description: AOU report data as flat array

LAUNCH_AOU.description: Launch AOU data as flat array

IMPACT_AOU.description: Impact AOU data as flat array

GAIN.description: Gain level in dBi at this contour

EIRP.description: EIRP at beam center in dBW

G_OVER_T.description: G/T at beam center in dB/K

ESL.description:
Entity / Standards Link — join-table row connecting a host-local entity
metadata record to a standards record index row, enabling cascade-safe
mutation and cross-plugin query ownership.

LINK_KEY.description: Stable local link key for one entity / record association.

ENTITY_ID.description: Stable host-local entity id on the entity side of the association.

ENTITY_RECORD_KEY.description: Stable local entity metadata record key (for example `ENTITY:<id>`).

ENTITY_ROWID.description: FlatSQL row id for the linked entity metadata row when known.

RECORD_KEY.description: Stable local standards record key on the record side of the association.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: SDS schema family for the linked record (`OMM`, `CAT`, `OEM`, `CDM`, etc.).

RECORD_ROWID.description: FlatSQL row id for the linked standards record row when known.

CASCADE_DELETE.description: Whether entity deletion should cascade to the linked standards record.

UPDATED_AT_MS.description: Milliseconds since epoch when the association was last refreshed.

PUBLIC_KEY.description: Public part of the cryptographic key, in hexidecimal format

PRIVATE_KEY.description: Private part of the cryptographic key in hexidecimal format, should be kept secret

KEY_ADDRESS.description: Address generated from the cryptographic key

ADDRESS_TYPE.description: Type of the address generated from the cryptographic key

KEY_TYPE.description: Type of the cryptographic key (signing or encryption)

REGION.description: Region of the address (e.g., state or province)

LOCALITY.description: Locality of the address (e.g., city or town)

ChainProof.description: Proves a blockchain key derives from the same HD wallet as the signing key

SIGNED_PAYLOAD.description: The canonical payload that was signed (hex-encoded)

LEGAL_NAME.description: Common name of the entity (person or organization)

FAMILY_NAME.description: Family name or surname of the person

GIVEN_NAME.description: Given name or first name of the person

ADDITIONAL_NAME.description: Additional name or middle name of the person

HONORIFIC_PREFIX.description: Honorific prefix preceding the person's name (e.g., Mr., Dr.)

HONORIFIC_SUFFIX.description: Honorific suffix following the person's name (e.g., Jr., Sr.)

KEYS.description: Cryptographic keys associated with the entity

MULTIFORMAT_ADDRESS.description: Multiformat addresses associated with the entity

SIGNATURE.description: Ed25519 signature over canonical EPM content (hex), signed by the first signing key in KEYS

SIGNATURE_TIMESTAMP.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the EPM was signed

CHAIN_PROOFS.description: Chain binding proofs linking blockchain keys to the same HD wallet

ENTITY_TYPE.description: Type of entity represented by this profile

sdfResult.description: Result of a single SDF point-in-volume query (24 bytes, 8-byte aligned).

SIGNED_DISTANCE.description: Signed distance (negative inside, zero on boundary, positive outside).

CLOSEST_DISTANCE.description: Distance to the closest boundary point (always positive).

sdfTimeRangeResult.description: Result of a time-range SDF query (40 bytes, 8-byte aligned).

ENTRY_TIME.description: Julian date when the entity entered the volume (0 == never entered).

EXIT_TIME.description: Julian date when the entity exited the volume (0 == still inside).

MIN_DISTANCE.description: Most negative signed distance (closest approach to center).

INNER_HALF_ANGLE.description: Inner half-angle for hollow cones (0 == solid).

FLAT_CAP.description: Use a flat cap (true) or a spherical cap (false).

INNER_RADIUS.description: Inner radius for hollow sphere (0 == solid).

SDFCustom.description: Custom SDF defined by a set of unit boundary-direction vectors.

DIRECTIONS.description: Unit vectors defining the boundary packed as [x0, y0, z0, x1, y1, z1, ...].

SDFComponent.description: Single component in a composed SDF.

PRIMITIVE.description: Root primitive type (useful when COMPONENTS[] is empty).

COMPONENTS.description: One or more components that may be combined via COMPOSITIONS[].

INPUT_OFFSET.description: Input buffer offset (arena bytes) where the Vec3[] of world points begins.

ENTITY_IDS_OFFSET.description: Entity-ids buffer offset corresponding to each point (optional).

OUTPUT_OFFSET.description: Output buffer offset where sdfResult[] is written.

INSIDE_COUNT.description: Number of points inside the volume.

SDF.description:
Signed Distance Field envelope message — carries a configuration, a batch
request, a batch response, or single / time-range result records.

KEY_ID.description: Logical key identifier used across publication and grant records.

SLOT_ID.description: Host-managed key slot or key handle identifier.

ROLE.description: Role the referenced key fulfills for the module flow.

ALGORITHM.description: Algorithm or key family for the referenced key.

PUBLIC_KEY.description: Optional public bytes for verification or peer identity binding.

VERSION.description: Logical version of the referenced key.

EXPIRES_AT.description: Expiration time in unix milliseconds, or 0 if unbounded.

HOST_MANAGED.description: True when the secret material remains in the host key slot.

SHWUniform.description: Uniform descriptor — name + type + optional default value.

UNIFORM_DEFAULT_VALUE.description: Optional default value encoded as bytes in the native type layout.

SHWCompileRequest.description:
Compile request — one shader source (typically a fragment of a
larger stage) plus metadata for the host splice.

SHADER_NAME.description: Logical shader name (used in logs and uniform prefixing).

SHADER_INJECTION_POINT.description: Intended injection point in the host pipeline.

SHADER_UNIFORMS.description: Expected uniforms declared by the source.

SHWCompileResponse.description: Compile response — whether the shader compiled, with diagnostics.

COMPILED_BINARY.description: Optional compiled binary (if the compiler emits one).

LINKED_UNIFORMS.description: Echo of the uniforms the compiler actually linked.

SHW.description:
Shader Wire envelope — carries either a compile request or a compile
response across the runtime boundary.

REQUESTER_XPUB.description: Requester account identity or wallet xpub

REQUESTED_AT.description: Request timestamp in milliseconds since epoch

EXPIRES_AT.description: Challenge expiration time in milliseconds since epoch

TARGET_INDEX.description: Index of target in input array.

ORIENT_W.description: Sensor orientation as quaternion (W, X, Y, Z).

SENSOR_ORIENT_W.description: Sensor orientation as quaternion (W, X, Y, Z).

INPUT_OFFSET.description: Input buffer offset where targetState[] starts.

TARGET_COUNT.description: Number of targets in the input buffer.

OUTPUT_OFFSET.description: Output buffer offset where detectionResult[] is written.

EPOCH.description: Current time as a Julian date.

OUTPUT_OFFSET.description: Offset in arena where detectionResult[] starts.

SDRSingleInput.description:
Compact single-frame detection input used by pluggable sensor models that
do not drive arena-backed batches.

MEAN_LONGITUDE.description: Current mean longitude in degrees East

SLOT_CENTER.description: Longitude slot center in degrees East (if station-keeping)

IS_STABLE.description: Indicates whether the observation is stable or not

OBJECT_ID.description: Unique identifier for the object being observed

PASS_DURATION.description: Duration of the observation pass in seconds

HD_KEY_PATH.description: Hierarchical Deterministic (HD) derivation path for the program's key, used in cryptocurrency wallets

MESSAGE_TYPES.description: Vector of standard message types used by the program

USERS.description: Vector of users associated with the program, each user can have assigned message types

REQUEST_ID.description: Caller-supplied request identifier for result correlation.

TOF_SEC.description: Time of flight (seconds). Must be greater than zero.

MU_KM3_S2.description: Central-body gravitational parameter (km^3/s^2). Must be greater than zero.

MAX_REVS.description: Maximum complete revolutions to search. Zero means single-revolution only.

REF_FRAME.description: Inertial reference frame label for both position vectors (for example GCRF, EME2000, ICRF).

EPOCH.description: Optional epoch/time-scale label for provenance. The solver uses TOF, not epoch, internally.

FLAGS.description: Request flags reserved for future compatibility.

YEAR.description: Four-digit year identifying the model version (e.g., 1970, 2008, 2020)

FrequencyRange.description: Frequency range with lower and upper limits

StokesParameters.description: Stokes parameters, representing different aspects of polarization

U.description: Another linear polarization, orthogonal to Q

Band.description: Table representing a frequency band with a name and frequency range

DATA_MODE.description: Mode of the data (real, simulated, synthetic)

POWER_TYPE.description: Type of power (eg. AC or DC)

TRANSMIT.description: Indicates if the EMT can transmit

RECEIVE.description: Indicates if the EMT can receive

TASKABLE.description: Indicates if the site is taskable

KEY_ID.description: Logical key identifier used across publication and grant records.

SLOT_ID.description: Host-managed key slot or key handle identifier.

ROLE.description: Role the referenced key fulfills for the module flow.

ALGORITHM.description: Algorithm or key family for the referenced key.

PUBLIC_KEY.description: Optional public bytes for verification or peer identity binding.

VERSION.description: Logical version of the referenced key.

EXPIRES_AT.description: Expiration time in unix milliseconds, or 0 if unbounded.

HOST_MANAGED.description: True when the secret material remains in the host key slot.

lambertVector3.description: Three-component vector in the request frame.

N_REVS.description: Complete revolution count for this branch. Zero for single-revolution.

ITERATIONS.description: Householder iteration count used to converge this branch.

ERROR_CODE.description: Structured error code when STATUS is ERROR.

ERROR_MESSAGE.description: Human-readable error message when STATUS is ERROR.

SINGLE.description: Single-revolution solution when STATUS is OK.

MULTI.description: Multi-revolution branches in ascending N_REVS order.

MAX_FEASIBLE_REVS.description: Highest revolution count that produced a feasible pair. Zero when no multi-rev branch is feasible.

FLAGS.description: Result flags reserved for future compatibility.

WASM_CID.description: IPFS CID of the encrypted module artifact

MODULE_HASH.description: SHA-256 hash of the decrypted module bytes

OBJECT_IDS.description: Specific NORAD IDs or catalog numbers

DataCoverage.description: Data coverage combining spatial and temporal

PRICE_AMOUNT.description: Price in smallest unit (cents, satoshis, etc.)

RATE_LIMIT.description: Rate limit in requests per hour

FEATURES.description: List of features included in this tier

PROVIDER_PEER_ID.description: Peer ID of the data provider

PROVIDER_EPM_CID.description: IPFS CID of provider's EPM (Entity Profile Message)

DESCRIPTION.description: Detailed description of the data offering

ENCRYPTION_REQUIRED.description: Whether encryption is required for data delivery

CREATED_AT.description: Unix timestamp when listing was created

UPDATED_AT.description: Unix timestamp when listing was last updated

ACTIVE.description: Whether the listing is currently active

ETM.description:
Entity Metadata — generic queryable metadata for a host-local entity.
Participates in shared FlatSQL/WASM runtimes where multiple plugins
cross-query the same entity collection.

NAME.description: Human-readable entity name used for shared query/search surfaces.

SUBTYPE.description: More specific runtime subtype or class name.

PARENT_ENTITY_ID.description: Optional parent entity id for hierarchy / linkage queries.

WASM_HANDLE.description: Collection-scoped WASM handle used for batch visibility application.

NORAD_CAT_ID.description: Optional NORAD catalog id for standards-backed entities.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Primary object name surfaced by attached standards metadata.

OBJECT_ID.description: Primary international / object designator surfaced by attached standards metadata.

CAT_OBJECT_NAME.description: Secondary CAT object name when different from the primary object name.

CAT_OBJECT_ID.description: Secondary CAT object id when different from the primary object id.

FACILITY_TYPE.description: Ground / facility subtype metadata for non-space entity search.

SEARCH_TEXT.description: Pre-normalized phrase-search text for collection-wide shared queries.

LAUNCH_YEAR.description: Launch year derived from launch date.

MEAN_MOTION.description: Mean motion in revolutions per day.

HAS_GP.description: Whether GP / OMM state is present for the entity.

ID.description: Unique identifier of the record, auto-generated by the system.

CLASSIFICATION.description: Classification marking of the data in IC/CAPCO Portion-marked format.

TYPE.description: The type of this collect or contact request.

ID_PLAN.description: Unique identifier of the parent plan or schedule associated with this request.

PLAN_INDEX.description: Index number for records within a collection plan or schedule.

TASK_ID.description: Task ID associated with this request.

DWELL_ID.description: The dwell ID associated with this request.

ID_SENSOR.description: Unique identifier of the requested/scheduled/planned sensor associated with this request.

ORIG_SENSOR_ID.description: Optional identifier provided by the source to indicate the sensor identifier requested/scheduled/planned for this request.

PRIORITY.description: The priority of the collect request.

TASK_CATEGORY.description: The tasking category associated with this request.

SUFFIX.description: The tasking suffix associated with this request.

UCT_FOLLOW_UP.description: Boolean indicating that this collect request is UCT follow-up.

START_TIME.description: The start time of the collect or contact request window, in ISO 8601 UTC format.

END_TIME.description: The end time of the collect or contact request window, in ISO 8601 UTC format.

NORAD_CAT_ID.description: Satellite/catalog number of the target on-orbit object for this request.

ORIG_OBJECT_ID.description: Optional identifier provided by the data source to indicate the target object of this request.

TASK_GROUP.description: The tasking group to which the target object is assigned.

ORBIT_REGIME.description: The orbit regime of the target.

TARGET_SIZE.description: The minimum object (diameter) size, in meters, to be reported.

RCS_MIN.description: The minimum Radar Cross-Section of the target, in m^2.

RCS.description: The Radar Cross-Section of the target, in m^2.

RCS_MAX.description: The maximum Radar Cross-Section of the target, in m^2.

FREQ_MIN.description: The minimum frequency of interest, in MHz.

FREQ.description: The estimated or expected emission frequency of the target, in MHz.

FREQ_MAX.description: The maximum frequency of interest, in MHz.

VIS_MAG_MIN.description: The minimum estimated or expected visual magnitude of the target, in Magnitudes (M).

VIS_MAG.description: The estimated or expected visual magnitude of the target, in Magnitudes (M).

VIS_MAG_MAX.description: The maximum estimated or expected visual magnitude of the target, in Magnitudes (M).

SPECTRAL_MODEL.description: The spectral model used for the irradiance calculation.

REFLECTANCE.description: The fraction of solar energy reflected from target.

NUM_FRAMES.description: For optical sensors, the requested number of frames to capture at each sensor step.

FRAME_RATE.description: For optical sensors, the frame rate of the camera, in Hz.

INTEGRATION_TIME.description: For optical sensors, the integration time per camera frame, in milliseconds.

NUM_TRACKS.description: The number of requested tracks on the target.

NUM_OBS.description: The number of requested observations on the target.

DURATION.description: The duration of the collect request, in seconds.

SRCH_PATTERN.description: The search pattern to be executed for this request.

SCENARIO.description: Pre-coordinated code, direction, or configuration to be executed by the sensor or site for this collect or contact.

ID_ELSET.description: ID of the Elset of the object associated with this request.

ID_MANIFOLD.description: ID of the Manifold Elset of the object associated with this request.

ID_STATE_VECTOR.description: ID of the State Vector of the object or central vector associated with this request.

ES_ID.description: ID of the Ephemeris Set of the object associated with this request.

EPOCH.description: Epoch time, in ISO 8601 UTC format, of the orbital elements.

SEMI_MAJOR_AXIS.description: The average of the periapsis and apoapsis distances, in kilometers.

ECCENTRICITY.description: The orbital eccentricity of an astronomical object.

INCLINATION.description: The angle, in degrees, between the equator and the orbit plane.

RAAN.description: Right ascension of the ascending node, in degrees.

ARG_OF_PERIGEE.description: The argument of perigee, in degrees.

MEAN_ANOMALY.description: The mean anomaly defines the angular position, in degrees, of the object on its orbital path.

RA.description: The expected or directed right ascension angle, in degrees.

DEC.description: The expected or directed declination angle, in degrees.

AZ.description: The expected or directed azimuth angle, in degrees.

EL.description: The expected or directed elevation angle, in degrees.

RANGE.description: The expected acquisition range or defined center range, in km.

EXTENT_AZ.description: The extent of the azimuth angle, in degrees, from center azimuth.

EXTENT_EL.description: The extent of the elevation angle, in degrees, from center elevation.

EXTENT_RANGE.description: The extent of the range, in km, from center range.

ALT.description: Height above WGS-84 ellipsoid (HAE), in kilometers.

STOP_LAT.description: The stopping WGS-84 latitude of a volume definition, in degrees.

STOP_LON.description: The stopping WGS-84 longitude of a volume definition, in degrees.

STOP_ALT.description: The stopping HAE WGS-84 height above ellipsoid (HAE), in kilometers.

SRCH_INC.description: The maximum inclination, in degrees, to be used in search operations.

X_ANGLE.description: The angular distance, in degrees, in the sensor-x direction from scan center.

Y_ANGLE.description: The angular distance, in degrees, in the sensor-y direction from scan center.

ORIENT_ANGLE.description: The magnitude of rotation, in degrees, between the xAngle direction and locally defined equinoctial plane.

NOTES.description: Notes or comments associated with this request.

ORIGIN.description: Originating system or organization which produced the data, if different from the source.

DATA_MODE.description: Indicator of whether the data is EXERCISE, REAL, SIMULATED, or TEST data.

ENC.description: Encryption Header containing all parameters needed for decryption

EPHEMERAL_PUBLIC_KEY.description: Ephemeral public key for ECDH key agreement (32-65 bytes depending on algorithm)

NONCE_START.description: Random 12-byte nonce starting value. Incremented for each record in the stream to ensure unique nonces.

RECIPIENT_KEY_ID.description: Optional identifier for the recipient's public key (up to 32 bytes)

SCHEMA_HASH.description: Optional SHA-256 hash of the FlatBuffers schema (32 bytes)

ROOT_TYPE.description: Optional root type name from the schema

TIMESTAMP.description: Optional Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when encryption was performed

weightedEdge.description: Weighted directed edge (16 bytes, 8-byte aligned for zero-copy ingestion).

VERTEX_COUNT.description: Number of vertices in the graph.
Optional vertex capacity for implicit graph creation.

BUILD_GRAPH.description: Build a CSR representation after ingest.

VERTEX_COUNT.description: Number of vertices in the graph.
Number of vertices in the solved graph.

PREDECESSORS.description: Predecessor array (length == VERTEX_COUNT; UINT32_MAX means none / source).

SOURCE.description: Source vertex index from the latest SSSP solve.

REACHABLE.description: Whether a path exists from SOURCE to TARGET.

DISTANCE.description: Total distance from SOURCE to TARGET (Infinity if unreachable).

PATH.description: Vertex sequence from SOURCE to TARGET.

FPC.description:
Fastest Path Compute — envelope message for weighted graph ingestion and
single-source shortest path execution.

DENSITIES.description: Electron densities at each altitude in electrons/m^3

FOES.description: foEs sporadic E critical frequency in MHz

HMF2.description: hmF2 peak height of F2 layer in km

HMF1.description: hmF1 peak height of F1 layer in km

HME.description: hmE peak height of E layer in km

NMF2.description: NmF2 peak density of F2 layer in electrons/m^3

MJD.description: Modified Julian Date in UTC, e.g., 58119

X_POLE_WANDER_RADIANS.description: x component of Pole Wander in radians, e.g., 2.872908911518888E-7

Y_POLE_WANDER_RADIANS.description: y component of Pole Wander in radians, e.g., 1.2003259523750447E-6

X_CELESTIAL_POLE_OFFSET_RADIANS.description: x component of Celestial Pole Offset in radians, e.g., 5.720801437092525E-10

Y_CELESTIAL_POLE_OFFSET_RADIANS.description: y component of Celestial Pole Offset in radians, e.g., -8.484239419416879E-10

UT1_MINUS_UTC_SECONDS.description: UT1 minus UTC in seconds, e.g., 0.2163567

TAI_MINUS_UTC_SECONDS.description: TAI minus UTC in seconds, e.g., 37

LENGTH_OF_DAY_CORRECTION_SECONDS.description: Correction to Length of Day in seconds, e.g., 8.094E-4

LONGITUDE_MIN.description: Western longitude boundary of slot (degrees east)

LONGITUDE_MAX.description: Eastern longitude boundary of slot (degrees east)

LOST_FLAG.description: True if object is lost/not tracked

WET_MASS.description: Maximum wet mass (with propellant) in kg

DERIVED_FROM.description: Source record this was derived from

GEO_POSITION.description: GEO longitude at event time (degrees east)

CHEMISTRY.description: Battery chemistry (e.g., LI_ION, NICD, NIMH, LIPO, SILVER_ZINC)

QUANTITY.description: Number of batteries of this type

MAX_DOD.description: Maximum depth of discharge as fraction (0.0-1.0)

STATE_OF_HEALTH.description: Current state of health as fraction (0.0-1.0)

STEP_SIZE.description: Time interval between attitude states in seconds (required).

ATTITUDE_COMPONENTS.description:
Number of components per attitude state.
7 = quaternion + angular rates (Q1, Q2, Q3, QC, RATE_X, RATE_Y, RATE_Z)
4 = quaternion only (Q1, Q2, Q3, QC)

ATTITUDE_DATA.description:
Attitude data as row-major array of doubles.
Layout: [Q1_0, Q2_0, Q3_0, QC_0, RATE_X_0, RATE_Y_0, RATE_Z_0, Q1_1, ...]
Time reconstruction: epoch[i] = START_TIME + (i * STEP_SIZE)
Length must be divisible by ATTITUDE_COMPONENTS.

REENTRY_EPOCH_UNC.description: Reentry epoch uncertainty window in hours

PREV_PREDICTION_EPOCH.description: Previous predicted reentry epoch for comparison (ISO 8601)

SOLAR_RAD_AREA.description: Solar radiation pressure area in m^2

SRI.description:
Standards Record Index — local wrapper for a standards payload's identity
and mutation metadata, participating in shared FlatSQL query and cascade
paths across plugins that read the same record universe.

RECORD_KEY.description: Stable host-local record key for one standards payload.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: SDS schema family for the record (`OMM`, `CAT`, `OEM`, `CDM`, etc.).

ROLE.description: Attachment role when one standards message produces multiple entity records.

ATTACHED_VIA.description: Ingest path that registered this record (`stream-*`, `manual-api`, etc.).

PAYLOAD_KIND.description: High-level payload representation retained by the mutation registry.

UPDATED_AT_MS.description: Milliseconds since epoch when the local mutation record was last refreshed.

FrequencyRange.description: Frequency range with lower and upper limits

StokesParameters.description: Stokes parameters, representing different aspects of polarization

U.description: Another linear polarization, orthogonal to Q

Band.description: Table representing a frequency band with a name and frequency range

DATA_MODE.description: Mode of the data (real, simulated, synthetic)

POWER_TYPE.description: Type of power (eg. AC or DC)

TRANSMIT.description: Indicates if the EMT can transmit

RECEIVE.description: Indicates if the EMT can receive

TASKABLE.description: Indicates if the site is taskable

OBJECT_TYPE.description: Object type (Payload, Rocket body, Debris, Unknown)

RCS.description: Radar Cross Section [meters2]; blank if no data available

ORBIT_TYPE.description: Orbit type (Orbit, Landing, Impact, Docked to RSO, roundtrip)

MANEUVERABLE.description: Indicates if the object is maneuverable

SIZE.description: Size [meters]; blank if no data available

MASS.description: Mass [kilograms]; blank if no data available

PPEPositionRecord.description:
A single time-segment record of polynomial coefficients for Cartesian position
(and optionally velocity). Coefficients are stored per axis.

To evaluate position at time t within this record's validity window:
1. Compute normalized time: tau = (t - EPOCH_MID) / EPOCH_HALF_SPAN
where tau is in [-1, +1].
2. Evaluate the polynomial basis of degree (NUM_COEFFICIENTS - 1) using
the coefficients for each axis.

Velocity coefficients, if present, follow the same evaluation procedure.
If HAS_VELOCITY_COEFFICIENTS is false, velocity can be obtained by
analytically differentiating the position polynomial.

EPOCH_MID.description:
Midpoint epoch of this record's validity window (ISO 8601 UTC or TDB).
Together with EPOCH_HALF_SPAN, defines the time interval:
[EPOCH_MID - EPOCH_HALF_SPAN, EPOCH_MID + EPOCH_HALF_SPAN]

EPOCH_HALF_SPAN.description:
Half-span of the validity window in seconds.
The full span is 2 * EPOCH_HALF_SPAN seconds centered on EPOCH_MID.

NUM_COEFFICIENTS.description:
Number of polynomial coefficients per axis.
The polynomial degree is (NUM_COEFFICIENTS - 1).
Typical values: 8-32 for high-fidelity ephemeris fits.

BASIS_TYPE.description: Polynomial basis type for interpreting the coefficient arrays.

POS_COEFF_X.description:
Position coefficients for X-axis (km).
Length must equal NUM_COEFFICIENTS. Ordered c0, c1, ..., c_{N-1}.

POS_COEFF_Y.description:
Position coefficients for Y-axis (km).
Length must equal NUM_COEFFICIENTS.

POS_COEFF_Z.description:
Position coefficients for Z-axis (km).
Length must equal NUM_COEFFICIENTS.

HAS_VELOCITY_COEFFICIENTS.description:
Whether explicit velocity coefficients are provided.
If false, velocity should be derived by differentiating the position polynomial.

VEL_COEFF_X.description:
Velocity coefficients for X-axis (km/s). Optional.
Length must equal NUM_COEFFICIENTS if present.

MAX_POSITION_RESIDUAL.description: Maximum position fit residual over this segment (km). Optional quality metric.

RMS_POSITION_RESIDUAL.description: RMS position fit residual over this segment (km). Optional quality metric.

PPEOrbitalElementRecord.description:
A single time-segment record of polynomial coefficients for classical orbital elements.

The six classical elements are:
1. SMA or R_PERIAPSIS (size/shape) — see SIZE_SHAPE_TYPE
2. Eccentricity (dimensionless)
3. Inclination (degrees)
4. Right Ascension of Ascending Node / RAAN (degrees)
5. Argument of Periapsis (degrees)
6. Anomaly (degrees) — see ANOMALY_TYPE

Evaluation follows the same normalized-time procedure as PPEPositionRecord.

EPOCH_MID.description: Midpoint epoch of this record's validity window (ISO 8601 UTC or TDB).

EPOCH_HALF_SPAN.description: Half-span of the validity window in seconds.

NUM_COEFFICIENTS.description: Number of polynomial coefficients per element.

BASIS_TYPE.description: Polynomial basis type for interpreting the coefficient arrays.

SIZE_SHAPE_TYPE.description: Parameterization of the first orbital element (SMA vs R_PERIAPSIS).

ANOMALY_TYPE.description: Anomaly type for the sixth orbital element.

COEFF_SIZE_SHAPE.description:
Coefficients for SMA or radius of periapsis (km).
Length must equal NUM_COEFFICIENTS.

COEFF_ECCENTRICITY.description:
Coefficients for eccentricity (dimensionless).
Length must equal NUM_COEFFICIENTS.

COEFF_INCLINATION.description:
Coefficients for inclination (degrees).
Length must equal NUM_COEFFICIENTS.

COEFF_RAAN.description:
Coefficients for RAAN (degrees).
Length must equal NUM_COEFFICIENTS.

COEFF_ARG_PERIAPSIS.description:
Coefficients for argument of periapsis (degrees).
Length must equal NUM_COEFFICIENTS.

COEFF_ANOMALY.description:
Coefficients for anomaly (degrees). See ANOMALY_TYPE for interpretation.
Length must equal NUM_COEFFICIENTS.

MAX_ELEMENT_RESIDUAL.description:
Maximum element fit residual over this segment. Optional quality metric.
Units depend on the element (km for SMA, degrees for angles, dimensionless for ecc).

RMS_ELEMENT_RESIDUAL.description: RMS element fit residual over this segment. Optional quality metric.

PPE.description:
Polynomial Ephemeris — top-level message containing metadata and
one or more polynomial coefficient records for a single space object.

A PPE message may contain position records, orbital element records, or both.
Records should be ordered chronologically by EPOCH_MID and should collectively
cover the time span [START_TIME, STOP_TIME] without gaps.

CENTER_NAME.description: Origin of the reference frame (e.g., EARTH, MOON, MARS).

TIME_SYSTEM.description: Time system used for all epochs in this message.

START_TIME.description: Start of the total time span covered by this ephemeris (ISO 8601).

STOP_TIME.description: End of the total time span covered by this ephemeris (ISO 8601).

DEFAULT_BASIS_TYPE.description:
Default polynomial basis type for all records in this message.
Individual records may override this with their own BASIS_TYPE field.

POSITION_RECORDS.description:
Array of position polynomial records.
Each record covers a time segment; together they span [START_TIME, STOP_TIME].

ORBITAL_ELEMENT_RECORDS.description:
Array of orbital element polynomial records.
Each record covers a time segment; together they span [START_TIME, STOP_TIME].

EPHEMERIS_SOURCE.description: Generating ephemeris source (e.g., "JPL DE440", "HPOP v2.1", "Basilisk chebyPosEphem").

NOMINAL_SEGMENT_SPAN.description:
Fit span in seconds used to generate each polynomial segment.
Informational; actual spans are in individual records.

NOMINAL_NUM_COEFFICIENTS.description:
Nominal number of coefficients per segment.
Informational; actual counts are in individual records.

FlatBufferTypeRef.description: Payload-schema identity for a stream frame or an accepted port type.

SCHEMA_VERSION.description: Optional semver or schema revision string.

ROOT_TYPE.description: Optional root type name within the schema.

TAB.description: Typed Arena Buffer — one descriptor for a payload slot in a shared arena.

OFFSET.description: Byte offset of the payload body within the arena.

SIZE.description: Byte length of the payload body.

ALIGNMENT.description: Required start alignment of the payload body (in bytes).

FRAME_ID.description: Optional opaque frame identifier for stream bookkeeping.

PORT_ID.description:
Optional port identifier for frames that route to/from a named
input or output port on a method (maps to
`PLG.PLGPortManifest.PORT_ID`). Empty for arena frames that carry
no port routing hint.

COTPoint.description: CoT Point - geographical point with error estimates

HAE.description: Height above WGS84 ellipsoid in meters

FILL_COLOR.description: Fill color in ARGB integer format

RAW_XML.description: Raw XML detail content (for extensions not covered above)

TYPE.description:
CoT event type (dot-delimited MIL-STD-2525/APP-6 hierarchy)
e.g. "a-f-G-U-C" = atom, friend, Ground, Unit, Combat

HOW.description: How the event was generated (e.g. "m-g" = machine GPS)

START.description: Time the event information was valid (ISO 8601)

STALE.description: Time the event information is no longer valid (ISO 8601)

ROW_INDICATORS.description: Row indicators for the hypothesis matrix

COL_INDICATORS.description: Column indicators for the hypothesis matrix

MATRIX.description: Matrix data as a boolean array in row major format; if overflow, adds additional rows

ANALYSIS_METHOD.description: Analysis methodology used to form the hypothesis

PLATFORM_TYPE.description: Platform type (e.g., SHIP, AIRCRAFT, GROUND, SATELLITE)

BAND.description: Operating band (e.g., HF, VHF, UHF, L, S, C, X, Ku, Ka)

SIZE_IN_BITS.description: Number of bits for this integer

MAX_SIZE_IN_BITS.description: Maximum size in bits (for variable length)
Maximum size in bits (for variable length)

LEADING_SIZE_BITS.description: Leading size field bits (for variable length)

PolynomialCalibrator.description: Polynomial calibrator - converts raw to engineering using polynomial

COEFFICIENTS.description: Polynomial terms (index is power, value is coefficient)

POINTS.description: Spline points ordered by raw value

MathOperation.description: Mathematical operation for math operation calibrator

MATCH_CRITERIA.description: Match criteria for selecting this calibrator
Match criteria for this alarm context

USE_CALIBRATED_VALUE.description: Use calibrated value (true) or raw value (false)

ARRAY_TYPE_REF.description: Reference to the array element type

OFFSET_IN_BITS.description: Offset in bits from reference location

ContainerEntry.description: Container entry list item (union of entry types)

RateInStream.description: Rate specification for container in stream

ArgumentRefEntry.description: Argument reference entry in command container

CONTAINER_REFS.description: Container references provided by this service

COMMAND_REFS.description: Command references accepted by this service

XTC.description:
SpaceSystem - Root element for XTCE document
A SpaceSystem defines the telemetry and command configuration for a space
vehicle or subsystem. SpaceSystems can be nested hierarchically to represent
the structure of a spacecraft (e.g., spacecraft -> subsystem -> payload).

ENC.description: Encryption Header containing all parameters needed for decryption

EPHEMERAL_PUBLIC_KEY.description: Ephemeral public key for ECDH key agreement (32-65 bytes depending on algorithm)

NONCE_START.description: Random 12-byte nonce starting value. Incremented for each record in the stream to ensure unique nonces.

RECIPIENT_KEY_ID.description: Optional identifier for the recipient's public key (up to 32 bytes)

SCHEMA_HASH.description: Optional SHA-256 hash of the FlatBuffers schema (32 bytes)

ROOT_TYPE.description: Optional root type name from the schema

TIMESTAMP.description: Optional Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when encryption was performed

REV.description: Review - User review of a storefront listing

LISTING_ID.description: ID of the listing being reviewed

ACL_GRANT_ID.description: ACL grant ID proving purchase (proof of purchase)

CanonicalizationRule.description: Canonicalization rule applied before hashing or signature verification.

version.description: Schema version for the canonicalization contract.

stripped_custom_section_prefix.description:
Strip any custom section whose name starts with this prefix before
hashing the module for signature verification.

bundle_section_name.description:
Logical container name used for the module bundle record within the
delivery artifact.

ModuleBundleEntry.description: One payload carried inside the module bundle.

role.description: High-level semantic role of the payload.

section_name.description:
Optional logical section name within the bundle, for example
`sds.authorization`.

type_ref.description:
SDS/shared-module schema identity when the payload is itself a
FlatBuffer. Stored as canonical JSON text for portability.

media_type.description: Optional media type for transitional payloads such as JSON envelopes.

flags.description: Implementation-defined bit flags for signed/encrypted/compressed state.

payload.description:
Embedded payload bytes. For single-file deployment this should be
populated for every entry.

description.description: Human-readable description for tooling and diagnostics.

MBL.description: Metadata stored in the REC trailer for one module delivery artifact.

canonicalization.description: Canonicalization rule used to compute module hashes.

canonical_module_hash.description: SHA-256 of the wasm module after stripping SDS-owned custom sections.

manifest_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical plugin manifest bytes.

manifest_export_symbol.description: Legacy ABI export retained for backward compatibility.

manifest_size_symbol.description: Legacy ABI export retained for backward compatibility.

FUEL_TYPE.description: Fuel Type Used in This Stage

THRUST.description: Thrust Produced by This Stage (in Newtons)
Thrust Produced by the Sustainer (in Newtons)
Thrust Produced by the Engine (in Newtons)

ENCRYPTED_BLOB.description: Encrypted data blob, containing the ciphertext of the original plaintext message.

EPHEMERAL_PUBLIC_KEY.description: Temporary public key used for the encryption session, contributing to the derivation of the shared secret.

MAC.description: Message Authentication Code to verify the integrity and authenticity of the encrypted message.

NONCE_START.description: Random 12-byte nonce starting value. Incremented for each record in the stream to ensure unique nonces.

TAG.description: Additional authentication tag used in some encryption schemes for integrity and authenticity verification.

IV.description: Initialization vector used to introduce randomness in the encryption process, enhancing security.

SALT.description: Cryptographic salt used in key derivation (e.g. HKDF) to ensure unique key material per session.

PUBLIC_KEY_IDENTIFIER.description: Identifier for the public key used, aiding in recipient key management and message decryption.

CIPHER_SUITE.description: Specifies the set of cryptographic algorithms used in the encryption process.

KDF_PARAMETERS.description: Parameters for the Key Derivation Function, guiding the process of deriving keys from the shared secret.

ENCRYPTION_ALGORITHM_PARAMETERS.description: Parameters defining specific settings for the encryption algorithm, such as block size or operation mode.

LONGITUDE.description: Longitude of the point being looked at

LATITUDE.description: Latitude of the point being looked at

ALTITUDE.description: Altitude of the point being looked at

TILT.description: Tilt in degrees from vertical (0=straight down)

RANGE.description: Range in meters from the point

COLOR.description: KML color in aabbggrr hex format
KML color in aabbggrr hex format
KML color in aabbggrr hex format
KML color in aabbggrr hex format

BG_COLOR.description: Background color in aabbggrr hex format

TEXT_COLOR.description: Text color in aabbggrr hex format

STYLE_URL.description: Style URL or inline style ID

COORDINATES.description: Coordinates (first = last to close the ring)

KMLLatLonQuad.description: LatLonQuad — four corner coordinates for ground overlay

KMLRegion.description: Region — Level of Detail bounding region

REFRESH_VISIBILITY.description: Whether to refresh on visibility change

FLY_TO_VIEW.description: Whether to fly to view on refresh

OPEN.description: Whether folder is open in tree view
Whether document is open in tree view

BAND.description: Operating band (e.g., C, Ku, Ka, L, S, X)

UPLINK_FREQ_MIN.description: Uplink frequency range minimum in MHz

UPLINK_FREQ_MAX.description: Uplink frequency range maximum in MHz

DOWNLINK_FREQ_MIN.description: Downlink frequency range minimum in MHz

DOWNLINK_FREQ_MAX.description: Downlink frequency range maximum in MHz

MISSION.description: Primary mission (e.g., FIXED_SAT, BROADCAST, MOBILE, RELAY, MILSATCOM)

RA_OF_ASC_NODE.description: Right ascension of ascending node in degrees

EVENT_EPOCH.description: Event epoch that spawned the manifold (ISO 8601)

SOURCE.description: Source of detection (sensor ID or method)

ORIG_SEMI_MAJOR_AXIS.description: Original pre-event semi-major axis in km

ETM.description:
Entity Metadata — generic queryable metadata for a host-local entity.
Participates in shared FlatSQL/WASM runtimes where multiple plugins
cross-query the same entity collection.

NAME.description: Human-readable entity name used for shared query/search surfaces.

SUBTYPE.description: More specific runtime subtype or class name.

PARENT_ENTITY_ID.description: Optional parent entity id for hierarchy / linkage queries.

WASM_HANDLE.description: Collection-scoped WASM handle used for batch visibility application.

NORAD_CAT_ID.description: Optional NORAD catalog id for standards-backed entities.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Primary object name surfaced by attached standards metadata.

OBJECT_ID.description: Primary international / object designator surfaced by attached standards metadata.

CAT_OBJECT_NAME.description: Secondary CAT object name when different from the primary object name.

CAT_OBJECT_ID.description: Secondary CAT object id when different from the primary object id.

FACILITY_TYPE.description: Ground / facility subtype metadata for non-space entity search.

SEARCH_TEXT.description: Pre-normalized phrase-search text for collection-wide shared queries.

LAUNCH_YEAR.description: Launch year derived from launch date.

MEAN_MOTION.description: Mean motion in revolutions per day.

HAS_GP.description: Whether GP / OMM state is present for the entity.

FlatBufferTypeRef.description: Payload-schema identity for a stream frame or an accepted port type.

SCHEMA_VERSION.description: Optional semver or schema revision string.

ROOT_TYPE.description: Optional root type name within the schema.

TAB.description: Typed Arena Buffer — one descriptor for a payload slot in a shared arena.

OFFSET.description: Byte offset of the payload body within the arena.

SIZE.description: Byte length of the payload body.

ALIGNMENT.description: Required start alignment of the payload body (in bytes).

FRAME_ID.description: Optional opaque frame identifier for stream bookkeeping.

PORT_ID.description:
Optional port identifier for frames that route to/from a named
input or output port on a method (maps to
`PLG.PLGPortManifest.PORT_ID`). Empty for arena frames that carry
no port routing hint.

FlatBufferTypeRef.description: Payload-schema identity for a stream frame or an accepted port type.

SCHEMA_VERSION.description: Optional semver or schema revision string.

ROOT_TYPE.description: Optional root type name within the schema.

TAB.description: Typed Arena Buffer — one descriptor for a payload slot in a shared arena.

OFFSET.description: Byte offset of the payload body within the arena.

SIZE.description: Byte length of the payload body.

ALIGNMENT.description: Required start alignment of the payload body (in bytes).

FRAME_ID.description: Optional opaque frame identifier for stream bookkeeping.

PORT_ID.description:
Optional port identifier for frames that route to/from a named
input or output port on a method (maps to
`PLG.PLGPortManifest.PORT_ID`). Empty for arena frames that carry
no port routing hint.

SIGNAL.description: Signal type code (e.g., L1C, L2P, L5Q, E1B)

VALUE.description: Observation value (units depend on type: m, cycles, Hz, dB-Hz)

GNSS_SAT_ID.description: GNSS satellite identifier (e.g., G01, R24, E05, C03)

ALTITUDE.description: Receiver altitude in meters above WGS-84

SNWBatchRequest.description:
Batch target detection request.

Sensor position and orientation are passed inline (not via an arena
offset) because they are small and uniform across a batch. The target
stream lives at INPUT_OFFSET as a tightly packed array of `targetState`
structs from SDR; the output detection stream is written to
OUTPUT_OFFSET as a tightly packed array of SDR `detectionResult` structs.

SENSOR_ID.description: Sensor-configuration identifier assigned during sensor registration.

SENSOR_ORIENT_W.description: Sensor orientation as a unit quaternion (W, X, Y, Z).

INPUT_OFFSET.description: Byte offset in the arena where the targetState[] input stream begins.

TARGET_COUNT.description: Number of target records at INPUT_OFFSET.

OUTPUT_OFFSET.description:
Byte offset in the arena where the detectionResult[] output stream
will be written.

EPOCH.description: Current time as a Julian date.

COUNT.description: Number of detection records written to OUTPUT_OFFSET.

DETECTED_COUNT.description: Number of targets whose SNR met the detection threshold.

OUTPUT_OFFSET.description: Byte offset where the detectionResult[] stream starts.

ERROR_MESSAGE.description: Optional error message when ERROR_CODE != OK.

SNW.description:
Sensor Runtime Wire envelope — carries either a batch request or a batch
response across the runtime boundary.

SIZE_IN_BITS.description: Number of bits for this integer

MAX_SIZE_IN_BITS.description: Maximum size in bits (for variable length)
Maximum size in bits (for variable length)

LEADING_SIZE_BITS.description: Leading size field bits (for variable length)

PolynomialCalibrator.description: Polynomial calibrator - converts raw to engineering using polynomial

COEFFICIENTS.description: Polynomial terms (index is power, value is coefficient)

POINTS.description: Spline points ordered by raw value

MathOperation.description: Mathematical operation for math operation calibrator

MATCH_CRITERIA.description: Match criteria for selecting this calibrator
Match criteria for this alarm context

USE_CALIBRATED_VALUE.description: Use calibrated value (true) or raw value (false)

ARRAY_TYPE_REF.description: Reference to the array element type

OFFSET_IN_BITS.description: Offset in bits from reference location

ContainerEntry.description: Container entry list item (union of entry types)

RateInStream.description: Rate specification for container in stream

ArgumentRefEntry.description: Argument reference entry in command container

CONTAINER_REFS.description: Container references provided by this service

COMMAND_REFS.description: Command references accepted by this service

XTC.description:
SpaceSystem - Root element for XTCE document
A SpaceSystem defines the telemetry and command configuration for a space
vehicle or subsystem. SpaceSystems can be nested hierarchically to represent
the structure of a spacecraft (e.g., spacecraft -> subsystem -> payload).

PRWInit.description:
Propagator initialization request — assigns TLE / OMM / Keplerian /
polynomial inputs to entity handles.

The actual per-entity source record is carried inline as raw bytes
tagged with SOURCE_KIND and, where useful, a SDS file_identifier.
Callers encode `OMM`, `OCM`, or a one-off Keplerian set and pass the
bytes verbatim; the propagator uses SOURCE_KIND to decide how to
consume them.

ENTITY_HANDLES.description: Entity handles to assign results to (same order as SOURCES[]).

SOURCES.description: Per-entity source records, encoded as SDS FlatBuffers.

MU.description: Gravitational parameter of the central body (km^3 / s^2).

RAAN.description: Right ascension of the ascending node (radians).

NORAD_ID.description: NORAD catalog number parsed from the TLE.

BYTES.description: Encoded source record as a FlatBuffer (consumed per KIND).

KEPLERIAN.description: Convenience inline form when KIND == KEPLERIAN.

TLE.description: Convenience inline form when KIND == TLE.

PRWBatchRequest.description:
Batch propagation request — propagate every entity in ENTITY_HANDLES[] to
EPOCH and write the result StateVector stream to OUTPUT_OFFSET in the
shared arena.

EPOCH.description: Target epoch as a Julian date (TIME_SYSTEM is configured on the host).

ENTITY_HANDLES.description: Entity handles to propagate (empty = all initialized entities).

OUTPUT_OFFSET.description: Output buffer offset in the arena where the StateVector stream begins.

MAX_COUNT.description: Maximum entities to process in this call (0 = unbounded).

TARGET_FRAME.description:
Target reference frame for the output state stream. Matches enum
values in SDS `RFM`. If zero, the propagator chooses its native frame.

PRWBatchResponse.description:
Batch propagation response header — describes the stream written to
OUTPUT_OFFSET and reports errors. The stream itself is
`STATE_VECTOR_SIZE`-tuple rows in the SDS `OCM` STATE_DATA layout.

OUTPUT_OFFSET.description: Offset in the arena where the state-vector stream begins.

STATE_VECTOR_SIZE.description: Components per state vector (6 = PV, 9 = PVA). Mirrors OCM.STATE_VECTOR_SIZE.

REFERENCE_FRAME.description: Reference frame for the stream (SDS `RFM`-compatible string tag).

FLAGS.description: Per-entity status flags (same cardinality as COUNT).

ERROR_MESSAGE.description: Optional error message when ERROR_CODE != OK.

PRW.description:
Propagator Runtime Wire — envelope that carries either an init request,
a batch request, or a batch response across a runtime boundary.

GPXLink.description: GPX link to an external resource

GPXWaypoint.description: A waypoint, point of interest, or named feature

ELEVATION.description: Elevation in meters above WGS84 ellipsoid

GEOID_HEIGHT.description: Height of geoid above WGS84 ellipsoid in meters

SAT.description: Number of satellites used for fix

AGE_OF_DGPS_DATA.description: Age of DGPS data in seconds

GPXTrackSegment.description: Track segment (continuous span of track points)

POINTS.description: Ordered track points in this segment

GPXRoute.description: Route (ordered list of waypoints for navigation)

AUTHOR_NAME.description: Person or organization who created the file

CZMDynInterval.description: A single interval in a time-varying property

VALUE_TYPE.description: Value type determines stride through DATA

DATA.description: Interleaved [time, value(s), ...] — stride depends on VALUE_TYPE

SAMPLED.description: Sampled data (when property uses epoch + data array)

CZMCartographicDegrees.description: Cartographic position (longitude, latitude, height in radians/meters)

HEIGHT.description: Height in meters above WGS84 ellipsoid

CZMCartesian.description: Cartesian position (X, Y, Z in meters)

LINE_COUNT_X.description: Number of grid lines along X

LINE_COUNT_Y.description: Number of grid lines along Y

LINE_THICKNESS_X.description: Thickness of grid lines along X

LINE_THICKNESS_Y.description: Thickness of grid lines along Y

LINE_OFFSET_X.description: Offset of grid lines along X

LINE_OFFSET_Y.description: Offset of grid lines along Y

CZMMaterial.description: Surface material (used by polygon, ellipse, box, etc.)

POSITIONS_CARTOGRAPHIC_DEGREES.description: Positions as cartographic degrees [lon, lat, height, lon, lat, height, ...]

POSITIONS_CARTESIAN.description: Positions as Cartesian [X, Y, Z, X, Y, Z, ...]

POSITIONS_CARTOGRAPHIC_DEGREES.description: Positions as cartographic degrees [lon, lat, height, ...]

CLOSE_TOP.description: Whether to close the top of extruded polygon

CLOSE_BOTTOM.description: Whether to close the bottom of extruded polygon

POSITIONS_CARTOGRAPHIC_DEGREES.description: Positions as cartographic degrees [lon, lat, height, ...]

LEAD_TIME.description: Trail time in seconds (how far behind)

TRAIL_TIME.description: Lead time in seconds (how far ahead)

COORDINATES_WSEN_DEGREES.description: Coordinates [west, south, east, north] in degrees

CZMPacket.description: A CZML Packet describing an entity and its properties

POSITION_EPOCH.description: Time-tagged positions [time, lon, lat, height, time, lon, lat, height, ...]

ORIENTATION_ARRAY.description: Orientation sampled data [t, x, y, z, w, t, x, y, z, w, ...]

DYNAMIC_PROPERTIES.description: Generic bag for all time-dynamic (non-static) properties

OPERATING_BAND.description: Operating RF band (e.g., X, C, L, S, P)

SEN_QUAT.description: Sensor quaternion (scalar-last: q1, q2, q3, q0)

MULTI_SOURCE.description: True if fused from multiple sources

TRACK_COMPONENTS.description: Number of components per point (default 3 for X, Y, Z)

ECEF_POS.description: ECEF position as flat array [X0, Y0, Z0, X1, Y1, Z1, ...]

ECEF_VEL.description: ECEF velocity as flat array [VX0, VY0, VZ0, VX1, VY1, VZ1, ...]

ECEF_ACC.description: ECEF acceleration as flat array [AX0, AY0, AZ0, AX1, AY1, AZ1, ...]

LC_POS.description: Local coordinate position as flat array

LC_VEL.description: Local coordinate velocity as flat array

LC_ACC.description: Local coordinate acceleration as flat array

COV.description: Covariance data (21 elements per point for 6x6 lower triangular)

ERR_ELLP.description: Error ellipse data (6 elements per point)

CHANGE_DETECTED.description: True if change detected from baseline

BRIGHTNESS_VARIANCE_CHANGE_DETECTED.description: True if brightness variance change detected

SOLAR_PHASE_ANGLE_BRIGHTNESS_CHANGE_DETE.description: True if solar phase angle brightness change detected

HIGH_ZENITH_AZIMUTH.description: True if high zenith angle observation

SAT_NO.description: Satellite catalog number of launched object

DERIVED_FROM.description: Source record this event was derived from

TARGET_ORBIT.description: Target orbit type (LEO, MEO, GEO, HEO, SSO, etc.)

OBJECTS_ON_ORBIT.description: Number of objects placed on orbit

FORECAST.description: True if this is a forecast

DERIVED.description: True if derived from other measurements

SEN_ENERGY_LEVEL.description: Energy level or range (keV or MeV)

FrequencyRange.description: Frequency range with lower and upper limits

StokesParameters.description: Stokes parameters, representing different aspects of polarization

U.description: Another linear polarization, orthogonal to Q

Band.description: Table representing a frequency band with a name and frequency range

DATA_MODE.description: Mode of the data (real, simulated, synthetic)

POWER_TYPE.description: Type of power (eg. AC or DC)

TRANSMIT.description: Indicates if the EMT can transmit

RECEIVE.description: Indicates if the EMT can receive

TASKABLE.description: Indicates if the site is taskable

ANTENNA_TYPE.description: Antenna type (e.g., PARABOLIC, PHASED_ARRAY, HORN, HELICAL, DIPOLE, PATCH, YAGI)

QUANTITY.description: Number of antennas of this type

BAND.description: Operating frequency band (e.g., UHF, L, S, C, X, Ku, Ka, V, W)

APERTURE.description: Antenna diameter or aperture in meters

POLARIZATION.description: Polarization type (e.g., LINEAR, CIRCULAR, DUAL, RHCP, LHCP)

SLEW_RATE.description: Maximum slew rate in degrees per second

PURPOSE.description: Purpose or function (e.g., TT_C, PAYLOAD, CROSSLINK, GPS)

DPMAsset.description: One immutable content-addressed object published for a dataset update.

FILE_NAME.description: File name or logical artifact name.

BYTE_LENGTH.description: Byte length of the published object.

BYTE_SHA256.description: SHA-256 hash of the exact published bytes, lowercase hex.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: SDS schema name for data artifacts, e.g. OMM.fbs, CAT.fbs, SPW.fbs.

SCHEMA_HASH.description: Hash of the SDS schema used to encode this object.

CONTENT_KEY_ID.description: Optional content-key identifier for encrypted artifacts.

DPMSourceBatch.description: Source batch metadata bound into the dataset publication.

SOURCE_SHA256.description: SHA-256 hash of raw source bytes, lowercase hex.

HTTP_LAST_MODIFIED.description: HTTP Last-Modified value observed during retrieval.

RECORD_COUNT.description: Number of normalized records emitted from this source.

WARNINGS.description: Warnings or policy notes produced during normalization.

DPMQueryBinding.description: Canonical query metadata that can replay the dataset selection.

CANONICAL_QUERY.description: Canonical query text or canonical JSON representation.

QUERY_SHA256.description: SHA-256 hash of CANONICAL_QUERY, lowercase hex.

RESULT_SHA256.description: SHA-256 hash of the ordered result bytes, lowercase hex.

QUERY_ENGINE.description: Query engine or profile name, e.g. FlatSQL.

QUERY_ENGINE_VERSION.description: Query engine version or profile version.

SCHEMA_NAMES.description: SDS schema names selected by the query.

PROVIDER_IDS.description: Provider peer IDs selected by the query.

SOURCE_NAMES.description: Source names selected by the query.

BATCH_IDS.description: Batch IDs selected by the query.

WINDOW_START.description: Inclusive query window start in ISO 8601 UTC.

WINDOW_END.description: Inclusive query window end in ISO 8601 UTC.

DPMEncryptionBinding.description: Encryption metadata for protected dataset artifacts.

ENCRYPTED.description: Whether any artifact in this manifest is encrypted.

POLICY_ID.description: Policy or listing identifier bound as AAD.

AAD_SHA256.description: SHA-256 hash of canonical encryption AAD, lowercase hex.

DPM.description:
Dataset Publication Manifest binding data/index CIDs, query replay,
source hashes, schema hashes, encryption metadata, and provider signature.

ASSETS.description: Published shard, index, and auxiliary artifacts.

SOURCES.description: Source batches used to build the dataset.

PROVIDER_SIGNATURE.description: Provider signature over the canonical manifest bytes or manifest digest.

QUANTITY.description: Number of thrusters of this type

PROPELLANT.description: Propellant type (e.g., HYDRAZINE, XENON, KRYPTON, MMH_NTO, N2, GN2)

OBJECT_IDS.description: Specific NORAD IDs or catalog numbers

DataCoverage.description: Data coverage combining spatial and temporal

PRICE_AMOUNT.description: Price in smallest unit (cents, satoshis, etc.)

RATE_LIMIT.description: Rate limit in requests per hour

FEATURES.description: List of features included in this tier

PROVIDER_PEER_ID.description: Peer ID of the data provider

PROVIDER_EPM_CID.description: IPFS CID of provider's EPM (Entity Profile Message)

DESCRIPTION.description: Detailed description of the data offering

ENCRYPTION_REQUIRED.description: Whether encryption is required for data delivery

CREATED_AT.description: Unix timestamp when listing was created

UPDATED_AT.description: Unix timestamp when listing was last updated

ACTIVE.description: Whether the listing is currently active

CELL_TYPE.description: Solar cell type (e.g., SILICON, GAAS, MULTI_JUNCTION, THIN_FILM, PEROVSKITE)

QUANTITY.description: Number of solar arrays of this type

AREA.description: Total array area in square meters

POWER_BOL.description: Beginning of life power output in Watts

POWER_EOL.description: End of life power output in Watts

DEGRADATION_RATE.description: Degradation rate per year as fraction

POS_UNC_FLAG.description: True if position uncertainty is flagged

PM_UNC_FLAG.description: True if proper motion uncertainty is flagged

MULT_FLAG.description: True if star is in a multiple system

NEIGHBOR_FLAG.description: True if nearest neighbor is within confusion radius

SHIFT_FLAG.description: True if position shift detected between catalogs

MULTIFORMAT_ADDRESS.description:
Multiformat Address
https://multiformats.io/multiaddr/
A universal address format for representing multiple network protocols. Examples include:
- /ip4/192.168.1.1/tcp/80 for an IPv4 address with TCP protocol
- /ip6zone/x/ip6/::1 for an IPv6 address with a zone
- /dns4/example.com for a domain name resolvable only to IPv4 addresses
- /ipfs/bafybeiccfclkdtucu6y4yc5cpr6y3yuinr67svmii46v5cfcrkp47ihehy/README.txt -IPFS address w/CID and path to `README.txt`.

PUBLISH_TIMESTAMP.description: Publish Time OF THE Publish Notification Message

CID.description:
Concatenated Content Identifier (CID)
This field is a unique ID for distributed systems (CID).
The CID provides a unique identifier within distributed systems, as detailed at https://github.com/multiformats/cid.

FILE_NAME.description:
File ID
This field is the Name

FILE_ID.description:
File ID
This field is the file ID / Standard Type

SIGNATURE.description:
Digital Signature of the CID
This is the digital signature of the CID, signed using the specified cryptographic method.

TIMESTAMP_SIGNATURE.description:
Timestamp Signature
Digital signature of the publish timestamp, using the specified cryptographic method for timestamp verification.

SIGNATURE_TYPE.description:
Type of Cryptographic Signature Used
Specifies the type of cryptographic signature used for the SIGNATURE field, indicating the specific blockchain technology, such as Ethereum or BTC.

TIMESTAMP_SIGNATURE_TYPE.description:
Type of Cryptographic Signature Used for Timestamp
Specifies the type of cryptographic signature used for the TIMESTAMP_SIGNATURE field, indicating the specific blockchain technology, such as Ethereum or BTC.

DESCRIPTION.description: Description of why object is of interest

OBJECT_IDS.description: Specific NORAD IDs or catalog numbers

DataCoverage.description: Data coverage combining spatial and temporal

PRICE_AMOUNT.description: Price in smallest unit (cents, satoshis, etc.)

RATE_LIMIT.description: Rate limit in requests per hour

FEATURES.description: List of features included in this tier

PROVIDER_PEER_ID.description: Peer ID of the data provider

PROVIDER_EPM_CID.description: IPFS CID of provider's EPM (Entity Profile Message)

DESCRIPTION.description: Detailed description of the data offering

ENCRYPTION_REQUIRED.description: Whether encryption is required for data delivery

CREATED_AT.description: Unix timestamp when listing was created

UPDATED_AT.description: Unix timestamp when listing was last updated

ACTIVE.description: Whether the listing is currently active

CP_X.description: Center of pressure X in m

CP_Y.description: Center of pressure Y in m

CP_Z.description: Center of pressure Z in m

IXX.description: Moment of inertia about X axis in kg*m^2

IYY.description: Moment of inertia about Y axis in kg*m^2

IZZ.description: Moment of inertia about Z axis in kg*m^2

IXY.description: Product of inertia XY in kg*m^2

IXZ.description: Product of inertia XZ in kg*m^2

IYZ.description: Product of inertia YZ in kg*m^2

TOR_1.description: Torque about body X in N*m

TOR_2.description: Torque about body Y in N*m

TOR_3.description: Torque about body Z in N*m

REQUESTER_XPUB.description: Requester account identity or wallet xpub

REQUESTED_DOMAIN.description: Requested domain proved for policy evaluation

PROVIDER_PEER_ID.description: Provider peer identifier that issued the challenge

SIGNATURE.description: Detached requester signature over the challenge payload

TIMESTAMP_MS.description: Proof timestamp in milliseconds since epoch

GJNPosition.description: A single position (longitude, latitude, optional altitude)

ALTITUDE.description: Altitude in meters above WGS84 ellipsoid (optional)

HAS_ALTITUDE.description: True if altitude was explicitly provided (distinguishes 0 from absent)

GJNLinearRing.description: A linear ring is a closed LineString with 4+ positions (first = last)

GJNPolygonRings.description: A polygon represented as an array of rings (outer boundary + holes)

RINGS.description: Rings: first is outer boundary, rest are holes
Array of position arrays (for MultiLineString, Polygon rings)

POLYGON_RINGS.description: Array of polygons each as array of rings (for MultiPolygon)

GJNProperty.description: A key-value property entry for Feature properties

NUM_VALUE.description: Property value as number (use if numeric)

IS_NUMERIC.description: True if NUM_VALUE should be used instead of VALUE

IS_BOOL.description: True if this property value is a boolean

BOOL_VALUE.description: Boolean value (use when IS_BOOL is true)

IS_NULL.description: True if this property value is JSON null

JSON_VALUE.description: Raw JSON string for complex values (objects, arrays)

NUM_ID.description: Numeric feature identifier (use when ID_IS_NUMERIC is true)

ID_IS_NUMERIC.description: True if the feature id is numeric rather than string

HAS_GEOMETRY.description: True if the feature has a geometry (false means geometry was JSON null)

PROPERTIES_IS_NULL.description: True if properties was JSON null (vs empty object)

GJNBoundingBox.description: GeoJSON Bounding Box [west, south, east, north] or [west, south, min-alt, east, north, max-alt]

HAS_ALTITUDE.description: True if the bbox includes altitude (6 values vs 4)
